theme: minting twin coins that ring identically but weigh differently
title: Twin Coins: Cospectral Decoy Mints
strategies: single-switch baseline: swap one 6-vertex gadget block for its cospectral mate (matches the checker's own reference construction)
fixed small switch count: swap a constant number of blocks (e.g. 2) regardless of instance size -- the obvious 'apply the trick once or twice' recipe
full gadget composition: swap every available block for its cospectral mate, exploiting that disjoint-union spectra are multiset unions so per-block swaps are free and additive
